diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,179 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, initApp, getRuntimeKey
+- Reads as: TypeScript interface with generic type parameters, type imports from '../../hono', '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/base.ts, src/types/module.d.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper creates multiple handler arrays with different generic combinations for Env and Input types
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath, router
+- Reads as: TypeScript function exports using Context type, imports from '../../context', '../../request/constants', '../../utils/url'
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/url.ts
+- Safe summary: Helper functions retrieve route path and base path information from matched routes for logging and debugging
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, createWSMessageEvent, WSEvents
+- Reads as: TypeScript class and interface exports with generic types, imports from '../../context', '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/types/types.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper provides WSContext class for WebSocket message control and event handling
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, clearCookie
+- Reads as: TypeScript function exports using Context type, imports from '../../utils/cookie'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper functions parse, set, and generate cookies with support for signed cookies and prefix options
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: TypeScript function export with generic type parameters, imports from '../../client', '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/client/index.ts, src/context/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creates testable HTTP client from Hono apps using hc function with custom fetch
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: TypeScript function exports with Record and Context types, imports from '../../context'
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper identifies hosting platform (node, deno, bun, workerd, etc) and provides environment bindings
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, createCssContext, rawCssString, Style
+- Reads as: TypeScript interface and factory function exports, imports from './common', '../../helper/html', '../../jsx/dom/css'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for defining and injecting styles with class name generation and keyframes
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString
+- Reads as: TypeScript symbols, constants, and function exports, no imports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities with class name validation, hash generation, and minification functions
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, ProxyFetch
+- Reads as: TypeScript function export with RequestInit interface, imports from '../../http-exception', '../../utils/headers'
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy HTTP request helper that forwards requests with header filtering and RFC compliance
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: TypeScript function exports with Env generic, imports from '../../utils/color', '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/color.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting and displaying registered routes with optional verbose and colorized output
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: TypeScript template literal function export, imports from '../../utils/html'
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping helper that processes template literals with values and escapeToBuffer callbacks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: TypeScript re-export file, imports from './ssg', './middleware', './plugins'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Static site generation helper exports plugins and middleware for SSG context handling
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: ToSSGResult, generateFilePath, defaultExtensionMap, ensureWithinOutDir, filterStaticGenerateRoutes
+- Reads as: TypeScript interface and function exports, imports from './middleware', './utils', '../../client/utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/utils/mime.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG generation logic with path building, extension mapping, and security checks for path traversal
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: TypeScript function exports with path manipulation logic, imports from '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Path utility functions for SSG including dirname, joinPaths with parent path handling, and dynamic route detection
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSGParams, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, AddedSSGDataRequest
+- Reads as: TypeScript type interfaces and middleware functions, imports from './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for attaching params to requests, context detection, and static-only route guards
+
+## src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Main exports or names: defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, SSGPlugin
+- Reads as: TypeScript plugin function exports with Hono plugin interface, no imports
+- Neighb
